extra.reason: Implemented ahead of Phase 0 sign-off (7cc.3 field-test, 7cc.5 approval) per Dan's direct request.
mealie_public_url setting added; all browser links use it via settings.mealie_link_url(); API calls unchanged on base URL; setup wizard has both fields.
Recipes tab live: browse/search, URL import (Mealie scraper + LLM fallback), photo import via vision LLM, manual entry, shared review editor. extract_recipe on all 4 providers.

Implemented: 3-tier classifier (ready/staples/shopping) in services/mealie.py, TheMealDB client in services/recipes_external.py with import-to-Mealie, Save+list combo for external shopping-tier recipes, HA shopping summary endpoint + sensor + Lovelace tile and card.
Cook tab live at /ui/cook with images, collapsible ingredients, plan/save/save+list actions
nav_order/nav_hidden settings + registry-rendered navbar + show/hide/reorder editor in Settings Interface pane
Tabs with requires=mealie auto-hide when Mealie unconfigured; manual hide combines; pages reachable by URL
Side-menu settings layout: Inventory/AI Providers/Recipes/Interface/Security panes, per-section tests, global save
Staples editor, perishable_days, expiring_soon_days, suggest_per_tier in Settings; classifier reads from settings
recipe_source picker (themealdb/spoonacular/off), TheMealDB key support, Spoonacular client with caching, /setup/test/recipes
Secrets never rendered into setup HTML; has-flags only; blank=keep, __CLEAR__=erase
0600 settings.json, compare_digest for X-API-Key, error redaction, saved-key fallback for tests, rotation notes in Security pane

Pinned grocy 4.6.0, mealie v3.19.2, ollama 0.30.8 in both compose files; documented upgrade procedure in README
All 5 children complete; hardening work done (Phase 0 dependency was a sequencing gate, not remaining work)
Custom storage categories implemented: storage_categories.py registry; inventory panels and classifier are data-driven; setup UI with add/remove/save; config persists to settings.json
Field-tested on KOROLEV: Test button green, meal plan add/delete, shopping list check-off, and cook-tier suggestions all verified against live Grocy inventory.
Dan approved the recommended scope: route+template smoke tests, GitHub Actions (ruff+pytest) on push/PR with README badge, and a permanent Mealie integration test. Implemented and pushed.

TestClient smoke tests: 11 GET UI pages render (200), root redirect, /health shape, setup-save round-trip; Grocy/Mealie mocked, no network/Docker. Also added Mealie integration tests (real MealieClient over httpx.ASGITransport): v2/v1 scope detection, mealplan/shopping parsing, concurrent recipe fetch, classify tiering. tests/test_smoke_routes.py + tests/test_mealie_integration.py.
Added .github/workflows/ci.yml running ruff + pytest on push to main and on PRs; ruff config in pyproject.toml; CI badge in README.

Dan approved all three remaining items: 6eg.1 (Grocy public URL via settings, mirrors Mealie pattern), ojp.4 (barcode auto-check shopping list as opt-in checkbox in settings), 6eg.3 (HA docs audit, screenshots already done).
Added grocy_public_url field + grocy_link_url() method mirroring mealie pattern; setup page and SavePayload updated; grocy_url passed to inventory template context
Implemented barcode_autocheck_shopping setting; on commit, token-matches item name against unchecked Mealie shopping list items and checks them off via _autocheck_shopping helper in pending.py
All 7 Phase 0 discussion/decision items resolved with Dan.
All 3 children done: pure-logic suite, route+template smoke tests, GitHub Actions CI (ruff+pytest, green).
All 4 children done: shopping-list add, cooked-it consume, HA sensors, barcode auto-check shopping.

HA docs audited and corrected: automations.yaml had wrong entity ID (food_expiring_3d → food_expiring_3_days, silently broken), README sensor list updated from 4 to 7 sensors with correct entity IDs, lovelace hardcoded Grocy IP replaced with YOUR_GROCY_HOST placeholder.
All 4 children done: PWA icons, Mealie public URL split, Grocy public URL, HA docs refresh.

mbc: settings menu reorganized into focused panes (all settings preserved, IDs unchanged); also fixed latent toggleAuthRequired bug. 5qs: external recipe lookups now normalize Grocy stock names to core ingredient terms before querying TheMealDB/Spoonacular, with a new unit test.

mbc: settings menu reorganized into focused panes (all settings preserved, IDs unchanged); also fixed latent toggleAuthRequired bug. 5qs: external recipe lookups now normalize Grocy stock names to core ingredient terms before querying TheMealDB/Spoonacular, with a new unit test.

Added CHANGELOG.md with user-facing notes for 1.0.0-1.2.0 (no AI-cleanup references) plus a maintainer note to use these entries as the GitHub Release body instead of auto-generated commit lists; linked from README.

Added server-side UI theme switcher (Settings → Interface). Ships Dark + Light (native Bootstrap 5.3 data-bs-theme) plus three vendored Bootswatch themes (Darkly, Cyborg, Flatly) served locally — no new CDN dependency. Applied globally via a context processor across base/login/setup templates; hardcoded dark colors replaced with theme-aware Bootstrap CSS variables. Unknown theme falls back to dark.
Closed
Implemented Cook page tuning panel (4 sliders + dietary pills), wired to AI/Spoonacular/TheMealDB suggestions, with tests.
Implemented: AI-only badges on complexity/spice/portions, cuisine picker wired to AI/Spoonacular/TheMealDB, 5 new tests (116 total passing).
V1 spec written and migrated to private FoodAssistant-Appliance repo (docs/appliance-v1.md)
Phone QR deep-link shipped in v1.4.0. GET /ui/qr returns SVG, navbar modal with QR + selectable URL.
Private repo created (foodassistant-hardware), appliance-v1.md migrated, pushed. Public repo has user-facing supported-hardware.md instead.
Kiosk CSS pass shipped in v1.4.0. Real-hardware validation still needed but that's tracked under 053.
BOMs pushed to foodassistant-hardware. Dependency on 571 is satisfied — both done.
Stream Deck controller package shipped: config/layout/actions/render/controller, systemd unit, udev rule, example config, docs, and 23 pure-logic tests (all 160 tests pass). Software side complete.

UI scale setting (Small/Normal/Large/Extra large) implemented as a document zoom, selectable in Settings>Interface with immediate apply, stored server-side. Per-display-size auto-mapping in the wizard is tracked under 0zz.
Default model updated to gemini-2.5-flash across config, wizard, and provider. Live model-list fetching remains a nice-to-have under the wizard redesign (0zz).
CDP WebSocket Page.navigate implemented in controller.py; config.toml kiosk_cdp_url field wires it up

Pi detection implemented: app/hardware.py (is_raspberry_pi/board_model, cached, FOODASSISTANT_FORCE_MODEL hook) + firstboot.sh is_raspberry_pi() with FORCE_PI hook. Tests in tests/test_hardware.py (5 passing).

Mode-select wizard step + server plumbing done: data-driven cards filtered by host, /setup/mode persistence, /setup/test/remote, is_configured() relaxed for pi_remote, wizard skips Grocy/AI for remote. Tests in test_setup_mode.py.

Pi Remote thin-client install path done independently of the 92e.2 bootstrap-wizard piece: firstboot is_remote_mode() skips Docker+stack, installs only kiosk/Stream Deck pointed at REMOTE_SERVER_URL. 6 DRY_RUN tests pass. (Mode is pre-seeded via config.env/settings.json; on-device no-Docker wizard tracked in 92e.2.)

Added STEPS= env var to firstboot.sh; done-marker check bypassed, mark_done skipped. User can now run STEPS=streamdeck sudo bash firstboot.sh to provision just the Stream Deck. 3 new tests. 192 total.
QR modal moved to body level; backdrop and dismiss button now work correctly on all browsers.
Added _grocy_url_for_browser(): remote browsers now get a pre-filled URL using the host they used to reach FoodAssistant (same IP, port 9383) instead of localhost.
auto_hidden_groups() added to navigation.py; lock icon in navbar links to setup#pane-recipes; setup.html activates the matching pane via URL hash.
Confirmed: Mealie is fully wired in wizard step 5 and buildPayload(). auto_hidden_groups() now surfaces lock hints so users know Mealie unlocks Recipes/Cook/Mealplan/Shopping.

Added scanner_type picker (USB HID / Camera / unset) to wizard step 5 and Settings Inventory pane. USB mode shows a keyboard-wedge test field that validates barcode reception on Enter. scanner_type saved to settings.

Added color-coded status icons to sidebar pills (green=ok, yellow=needs attention, grey=optional-not-set) and a warning banner when Grocy or Security need attention. Progressive disclosure for Docker commands is a future iteration.

Replaced em-dashes with colons throughout CHANGELOG, README, all Python sources, templates, and shell scripts. Removed box-drawing separator chars from HTML/JS/CSS/Jinja2 comments. 40 files changed, 192 tests pass.

Pi Remote mode (pi_remote) fully implements this: DEPLOYMENT_MODE=pi_remote + REMOTE_SERVER_URL in config.env skips the local Docker stack, points kiosk and Stream Deck at the remote server. Documented in config.env and firstboot.sh.

Documented the Imager limitation in sd-image.md. Stock Pi OS is now the recommended primary path (full Imager customization). Pre-built image section notes the workaround. A bespoke solution (option b from the bead) is a future enhancement.

Added timer_1/2/3 countdown timer widget to Stream Deck. Presses cycle 5/10/15/30/60 min presets; key shows MM:SS live; expires with Done! alert in red. 3 independent timers can run simultaneously. Weather and HA entity control deferred to future iteration.

Audit complete. Chores/tasks/batteries/equipment out of scope. Filed FoodAssistant-5b1 (Grocy shopping list as Mealie fallback, P3) and FoodAssistant-75i (stock journal history view, P4). Recipes/shopping already covered by Mealie. Barcode lookup covered by Open Food Facts + LLM.
Implemented. Shopping tab always visible now; shows Grocy shopping list when Mealie not configured. Mealie path unchanged. New /grocy/shopping/* REST endpoints + GrocyClient methods.
Implemented. /ui/journal shows Grocy stock log with type badges, qty, filter, limit selector. Link added to inventory header.

Implemented. DISPLAY_ROTATION=N in config.env writes video=HDMI-A-1:rotate=N to cmdline.txt during firstboot. New foodassistant-set-rotation helper for post-provisioning updates. Documented in sd-image.md. 4 tests added (204 total passing).

All code-side blockers resolved. Version bumped to 1.6.0 with full CHANGELOG. Remaining manual step: 'git tag v1.6.0 && git push origin v1.6.0' triggers the release-image.yml CI to build and attach the .img.xz to the GitHub Release. Optionally make the GHCR package public for faster first-boot pulls.

Implemented as restock suggestions: products consumed recently (configurable look-back, default 30 days) that are now out of stock appear as a sidebar on the Grocy shopping page. One-click adds them to the list. /grocy/suggestions endpoint.

Implemented. foodassistant-accel-rotation script reads LSM6DSOX via smbus2, maps gravity axis to 0/90/180/270, calls foodassistant-set-rotation. firstboot.sh auto-detects the sensor via i2cdetect and installs the helper + smbus2. Axis-to-rotation mapping needs calibration against the actual mounting; see docstring.
External Recipes collapsible step added to wizard step 5: TheMealDB (free) or Spoonacular (API key). Wired into buildPayload().
Remote Access collapsible step added to wizard step 5: explains Cloudflare Tunnel and links to Settings pane-tunnel for full config.
About page: added donate/support panel with links to Grocy, Mealie, TheMealDB, Open Food Facts. Added two dependency cards (ZBar, python-elgato-streamdeck).
Weather widget implemented: WeatherState class, wttr.in fetch, config fields, controller integration, 6 tests pass
Hardware wizard step added: Stream Deck (yes/no, key count 6/15/32), display (size, rotation, touch), per-mode sequences updated
ha_1..ha_5 action slots implemented: live entity state polling, service calls on press, 8 new tests

Researched: no major US grocery chain exposes consumer purchase-history via official API (survey in design field). Dan chose store-agnostic receipt OCR, which already ships: Add page receipt radio -> /analyze/receipt -> LLM vision provider parses line items -> import queue -> commit -> Grocy. Works with gemini/openai/anthropic/ollama, any store, no per-chain integration or extra API key. Fixed hardcoded-provider status message. Follow-up x76 filed for capturing receipt purchase date to back-fill historical receipts.
On-device SSH installer shipped; boot-partition payload flow retired. Decision logic tested; needs a real Pi run to validate end-to-end provisioning.
Remote server URL now configured via pane-remote in setup.html; firstboot.sh no longer requires REMOTE_SERVER_URL in config.env
Settings sidebar gates local_stack panes behind features flag; pane-remote added for pi_remote URL config
